You're not imagining it

Stop me when this sounds familiar.

You're eating less than before — but your weight is still creeping up

You've tried keto, cutting rice, fasting — your body barely reacted

The cardio that used to work has stopped — doing more makes it worse

You're exhausted by 3pm and sleeping badly no matter what you do

Your doctor says everything is "normal" — but nothing about how you feel is normal

You know every diet rule. They used to work. Now they don't.

This is not a willpower problem. Perimenopause rewrites the rules of how your body stores fat, uses energy, and responds to food. The approach that worked at 35 is actively working against you now. The 30-minute call exists to show you exactly what needs to change — and whether we're the right people to help you change it.

Before you book

This call is built for a specific woman.

Book this call if…

  • ✓You're an Indian woman, 38–55, navigating perimenopause or early menopause
  • ✓You want a plan that works with Indian food — not around it
  • ✓You're done with generic advice that wasn't made for your body or your culture
  • ✓You want a real clinical nutritionist — not an app, not a PDF — in your corner
  • ✓You're ready to commit properly, and you want the right framework to do it

Skip this call if…

  • ✗You're looking for a 7-day crash diet before an event
  • ✗You're not ready to be consistent for more than a few weeks
  • ✗You plan to challenge the plan based on what you've read online
  • ✗You haven't decided you're serious yet — come back when you have

What to expect

What actually happens on the 30-minute call.

No pitch. No pressure. We want to understand your situation first — and tell you honestly whether we can help.

1

You tell us where you are right now

What you've tried, what hasn't worked, what's most frustrating. We listen first.

2

We assess whether we're the right fit

Honestly. If we're not the right people for your situation, we'll say so — and point you somewhere that is.

3

We explain what needs to change and why

You'll leave with a clear picture of what's happening hormonally — and what a proper approach looks like for your body.

4

You decide — zero pressure

If you want to move forward, we'll tell you exactly how. If you need time, take it. We follow up once.

Common questions

Before you click.

Yes — completely free. 30 minutes, no pitch. We cap it because we only take clients who are genuinely a fit. We need to understand your situation before we can say whether we can help. If we can't, you leave with clarity anyway — not a bill.
Yes. We work with Indian women across the diaspora — London, New Jersey, Dublin, Singapore, Dubai — and all over India. The call is on Zoom. Location is not a barrier.
Because what you tried wasn't built for perimenopause. Generic calorie-deficit logic doesn't account for the hormonal shift that changes how your body stores fat and responds to food. That's the conversation we'll have on the call — not a sales pitch, a real explanation.
No. Whatever we recommend is built around Indian food. Roti, rice, dal, ghee — they're all in. We'll talk through this properly on the call.
Anju — the clinical nutritionist behind the programme. Not a sales rep, not an assistant. Anju takes every call personally. She has 20+ years of clinical experience and has coached 6,000+ women. She will tell you honestly on the call whether she can help you.

The woman who books this call is different from the one who means to.
